CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR NOT NULL);

CREATE PROCEDURE ex_string_output_string () { declare s_out any; s_out := string_output(); declare s varchar; result_names (s); http('foo', s_out); http(' bar', s_out); s := string_output_string (s_out); result (s); };

CREATE PROCEDURE ex_nested_query () { declare s_out any; s_out := string_output(); declare s varchar; result_names (s); INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (3, (SELECT CONCAT(content, ' baz') FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)); http('Nested: ', s_out); http((SELECT content FROM test_table WHERE id = 3), s_out); s := string_output_string (s_out); result (s); };

CREATE PROCEDURE ex_multi_table_join () { declare s_out any; s_out := string_output(); declare s varchar; result_names (s); CREATE TABLE other_table (id INT, description VARCHAR); INSERT INTO other_table VALUES (1, 'desc foo'); INSERT INTO other_table VALUES (2, 'desc bar'); http((SELECT CONCAT(t.content, ' - ', o.description) FROM test_table t JOIN other_table o ON t.id = o.id), s_out); s := string_output_string (s_out); result (s); };

CREATE PROCEDURE ex_edge_case () { declare s_out any; s_out := string_output(); declare s varchar; result_names (s); http('', s_out); http('single space', s_out); http('!', s_out); http(NULL, s_out); s := string_output_string (s_out); result (s); };
